description: JSON schema for the getActor operation response payload

identifier.description: The actor's unique identifier in the specification, used to refer to it from test cases.

reportMetadata.description: The actor's additional metadata for XML reports.

default.description: Whether the actor should be considered as the default choice for new conformance statements within its specification.

hidden.description: Whether the actor should be hidden.

displayOrder.description: The actor's display order relative to other actors when presented in test execution diagrams.
